name: Katie
subject: FWD: Stand with me today, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Hey Friend,

I got this email from Paul Ryan and thought you should see it too.

He's getting tax reform passed so hardworking Americans like you and me can keep more of our take-home pay.

But he can only get it done if conservatives like us step up and show our support for his conservative agenda.

I know I'm chipping in as much as I can before the deadline tomorrow, I hope you will too! Here's the link: [secure.speakerryan.com/2017-september-eoq/](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MzA4MjE5NTAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMzY0MjY3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks and have a great weekend!

Katie

\--- Forwarded message ----------
From: Paul Ryan <info@speakerryan.com>
Date: Fri, Sep 29, 2017 at 11:35 AM
Subject: Stand with me today, Katie

Katie,

Your House Republicans are **moving your agenda forward -- ensuring your conservative vision becomes a reality.**

But I need your help, Katie.**** The Democrats are raising more than we are and they're using that momentum as their mandate to obstruct your conservative agenda.

With a busy final quarter ahead and an uphill battle against the Democrats, [**I will need every single conservative to stand with me.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MzA4MjE5NTAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMzY0MjY3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

We want to cut your taxes and give relief to the middle class. But because the Democrats love to assert their control with high taxes, I need you to stand with me against the left. Will you chip in today to help your House Republicans meet their September Q3 goal by midnight tomorrow?**

**[Chip in $10 >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzA4MjE5NTAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMzY0MjY3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Chip in $25 >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzA4MjE5NTAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMzY0MjY3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Chip in $50 >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzA4MjE5NTAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMzY0MjY3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

If we make a strong showing by midnight tomorrow, we will protect our majority and continue to pass your conservative agenda -- starting with tax reform.

Thank you,

Paul Ryan

P.S. With just hours left until the FEC deadline, I am **double-matching** every donation made before midnight on September 30th. [**Donate now to double your impact for your conservative values >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MzA4MjE5NTAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMzY0MjY3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Geri Prado, EMILY's List
subject: Republicans trying to recall 2 of our women >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61db/24c69fd9/903364d6/189da560/3581160727/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE961N_digital_email_20170929_EOQNevadaRecall_inact&source=WQEFE961N_digital_email_20170929_EOQNevadaRecall_inact")
---

Peter,

Republicans are trying to recall two of our democratically elected women in Nevada.

But since they have nothing valid to recall them for, **they're making stuff up.**

Why? Because the 2018 map is not good for the GOP, so they're hoping they can flip the state Senate now.

We will not let Republicans subvert the democratic process for their own political gain.

**[Donate $3 now to hit our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal to help our two women in Nevada who are facing a well-funded recall effort from the GOP and to support our women across the country.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61db/24c69fd9/903364d6/189da561/3581160727/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+hit+our+250000+EndofQuar&utm_campaign=WQEFE961N_digital_email_20170929_EOQNevadaRecall_inact&source=WQEFE961N_digital_email_20170929_EOQNevadaRecall_inact")**

There is not a single reason our women -- State Senators Joyce Woodhouse and Nicole Cannizzaro -- deserve to be recalled. In fact, they just capped one of the most feminist legislative sessions in the country.
That's because this isn't about policy or ethics. It's about Republicans being such sore losers that they're willing to undermine the entire democratic process.

We can't let them get away with it.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal so we can protect Joyce and Nicole from these disgusting attacks and elect more pro-choice Democratic women across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61db/24c69fd9/903364d6/189da562/3581160727/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE961N_digital_email_20170929_EOQNevadaRecall_inact&source=WQEFE961N_digital_email_20170929_EOQNevadaRecall_inact")**

Thanks,

Geri Prado
Senior Director of State & Local Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: Our tax fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Income inequality is one of the greatest injustices in our country. Instead of working to grow our middle class
#
Friends,
Income inequality is one of the greatest injustices in our country. Instead of working to grow our middle class and lifting people out of poverty, President Trump and House Speaker Paul Ryan have introduced a tax plan that would slash taxes for corporations and the very wealthy while destroying services like Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, and education.
Our Revolution is working to fight back against Wall Street banks and greedy corporations who benefit from an unfair tax system. We can't let the billionaire class get richer while children go hungry, men and women cannot afford basic medical care, and students are burdened with thousands of dollars of debt.
**[There's so much work ahead of us, and your support is critical to winning this fight. Can you chip in $3 or more to help us fight against a tax giveaway to corporations and the very wealthy?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af12/bed43eb/21953b/75ffe5f2/2970425388/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-eoq?refcode=em170929-subd")**
We know that despite advancements in technology and productivity, millions of Americans are working longer hours for lower wages. The reality is that for the past 40 years, corporations have rigged the rules to redistribute wealth and income to the wealthiest and most powerful people of this country. The Trump-Ryan tax plan is more of the same.
**[Will you help us stand up to the Trump-Ryan tax plan? Your $3 contribution to Our Revolution helps us fight for a fair tax system that invests in public services like education, health care, and infrastructure.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af12/bed43eb/21953b/75ffe5f2/2970425388/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-eoq?refcode=em170929-subd")**
It is our moral obligation to keep fighting for a country where corporations pay their fair share and everyone, regardless of race, class, or gender, can earn a living wage and make enough to take care of themselves and their family members. We won't stop fighting until we make that dream a reality.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I'm asking for your support today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek --

When I was running for president, one of the things I said so often is that we need more love and kindness in this country. These are the values that have always motivated me -- and they're a big part of why I chose Tim Kaine as my running mate.

If you mention Tim to anyone who knows him, whether it's a member of his church congregation who sang with him in the choir or a Republican senator who works with him across the aisle, you're likely to hear the same thing: Tim is a guy who believes in love and kindness.

**I'm proud to call Tim and Anne my friends, and I'm doing all I can to support Tim in his reelection campaign. Will you join me?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=T2fUuDWQ58YbahBz%2B%2BxjCZ%2ByEFKtfRLt)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ox4QAYmEmepbHoHenkwWrZ%2ByEFKtfRLt)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vPauS36N4elivJ2dztCT0Z%2ByEFKtfRLt)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=s1wOmINo8DRBBRgv48eYjZ%2ByEFKtfRLt)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hU3obXnlrOpFqha0oAB7d5%2ByEFKtfRLt)**

Here's the thing: Losing the election was hard -- for all of us. It's also hard to keep mustering the energy to continue fighting, day after day, for the America we still believe in. But what would be hardest of all is giving up.

Tim is someone who never gives up. When we lost in November, he didn't even take a vacation -- he went right back to work for Virginians in the Senate. For Tim, there was no rest for the weary. Guided by his love of this country and his care for the people he serves, he knew he had to continue to fight for what's right -- for Virginians and all Americans -- inch by inch, tooth and nail, no matter the obstacle. And now, more than ever, that's what we need in the Senate. So today, I'm asking you to help make sure we keep him there.

**[Please join me in supporting Tim's campaign by pitching in $10 or whatever you can right now.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gY3JhmduLGL17rIK3K%2BwbZ%2ByEFKtfRLt)**

Tim and I are both guided by faith, and during the campaign, we always reminded one another of this creed: Do all the good you can, for all the people you can, in all the ways you can, as long as ever you can.

**Let's make sure Tim can keep doing good for Virginia families in the Senate. Commit to supporting him before tonight's midnight deadline:**

**[https://www.timkaine.com/september-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ps%2FfDU1WektgfWqk9IG%2BhwsyVoi75NKF)**

Thank you,

Hillary

[**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZJf%2BAizrP1jt3PgDZnzslJ%2ByEFKtfRLt)
---

---

name: Al Franken
subject: The sooner we do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It's time for the world's shortest celebration. Ready? Here goes.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170930-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Dear team,

It's time for the world's shortest celebration. Ready? Here goes.

*****Woo!*****

That was fun. But why so short?

Well, because even though we stopped Republicans from taking health insurance away from tens of millions of families -- again -- this isn't the end of the health care fight.

**These guys will _never_ stop attacking the Affordable Care Act.** Just like they'll never stop trying to cut taxes for the top one percent, or trying to get rid of the consumer protections we fought to pass after the financial crisis, or trying to help big corporations pump more dark money into our elections.

**As long as there 's a Republican majority in the Senate, our values are at risk. So now that we're done celebrating, it's time to get back to work, because the next big deadline is coming up at midnight tonight.**

[**Click here to stand with Senate Democrats by making a contribution before the deadline!**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170930-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Remember how it felt this week when it looked like the unbelievably cruel Graham-Cassidy bill might actually pass?

Well, we're going to have more weeks like that. Whether it's pushing tax cuts for the rich, repealing Dodd-Frank, or even taking another run at health care (yes, believe it or not, they're still trying to figure out a way to do that), these guys will never, ever let up.

**Which means two things.**
1. **We need to be ready to stand together, and fight, and win -- as often as it takes.**

2. **The sooner we elect a new Democratic majority, the better.**

Fortunately, you can do both with one click.

[**Stand with Senate Democrats by making a contribution of $1 before the midnight deadline to help us fight their terrible policies today and end their majority come next November!**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170930-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I know it's a bummer to have to be on red alert all the time. I know it's not fair that we have to keep begging Republicans not to take away health insurance that millions of families rely on. And I know that every single one of you who called or wrote or showed up to protest that Graham-Cassidy bill deserves much more of a celebration.

But I also know that I can count on you to help us fight back next time, and every time. And I couldn't be more grateful.

Thanks,
Al

P.S.: Oh, okay, what the heck, let's indulge in a _slightly_ longer celebration: Wooooooooooooo!!! But now let's get back to work: [**Click here to contribute $1 and stand with Senate Democrats!**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170930-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Friend, Hate to bother you on a weekend, but I promise I’ll make this really quick. We have less than 24 hours to meet our fundraising goal, and I’m counting on you to get us through! Only $6,312 to go to meet our end of quarter goal! I can’t tell you how much it would mean to me to be able to send a bold, strong message to the supporters of Washington dysfunction: we’re coming for you. They scour every line, with the media, determining which candidates have the fitness to continue running for office. It’s how they choose winners and losers in politics. name: Geoff Burgan
subject: Fwd: I want to talk with you
body:
#
Team --
I just wanted to make sure you saw this note from Andrew yesterday. When we first launched this campaign in March, I never dreamed that our underdog candidate, who didn't have a famous name or the ability to self-fund his campaign, would receive thousands of contributions from across the state this early in the cycle.
Folks like you, who are committed to rebuilding Florida into a state that works for all of us, made that possible. And I'm confident that once again, we'll be able to count on you to support this people-powered movement before our critical end of month deadline tonight.
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3283/9e00690/4f5ca53f/24031473/1993150177/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170930-lift")**
This is how we create change -- not by continuing the same old, same old -- but through trying something new, through sticking to our values and fighting for what (and whom) we believe in.
Bring it home,
Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor
* * *
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Andrew Gillum** <reply@andrewgillum.com>
Date: Fri, Sep 29, 2017 at 4:19 PM
Subject: I want to talk with you
Team --
Our critical end of month deadline is quickly approaching, and I wanted to reach out to talk with you a little about what that means.
Right now, we're less than a year out from our primary election, and a little over a year away from the general election. In just under seven months, we've gone from being the longshot campaign that most folks had never heard of, to the people-powered campaign with the most grassroots donations of any candidate in the race. We've been shocked by the outpouring of support we've seen in different parts of the state, in big cities and small towns, in both deep red and bright blue counties.
You all have gone above and beyond to make this campaign and this movement possible -- and I am thankful to each and every one of you for that. You have proven your commitment to this race time and time again, which is why I'm asking:
[**Can you lift up our campaign one more time with a contribution before our end of month deadline tomorrow night?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3283/9e00690/4f5ca53f/24031472/1993150177/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170930lift")
Your support means we can continue to stick to our progressive principles and focus on spreading our message to every corner of the state. It makes it possible for us to talk about critical issues like Medicare for All, better public education funding, college affordability, an economy that puts working people first, investments in infrastructure, protecting our environment, and so much more.
We don't have to worry about what any big special interests donors are saying -- our grassroots campaign means that we're of, by, and for the people. We're only worried about doing what's best for the people of Florida.
[**If this is a movement you 'd like to be a part of, please pitch in to support our campaign today, and together we will win in 2018.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3283/9e00690/4f5ca53f/24031475/1993150177/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170929-eom")
Thank you for everything.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3283/9e00690/4f5ca53f/24031472/1993150177/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170930lift")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3283/9e00690/4f5ca53f/24031474/1993150177/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3283/9e00690/4f5ca53f/24031477/1993150177/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3283/9e00690/4f5ca53f/24031476/1993150177/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Getting sick or hurt shouldn't break the bank.
body:
Let's start October with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tonight's end-of-quarter deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405234dc/4067b0a/3ade30eb7/7e62adbf/3896197200/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170930_ke_nd&source=em_20170930_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170930_ke_nd")**

Picture yourself at the emergency room, Derek.

You're at the front desk, filling out paperwork so you or someone you love can receive medical attention. You're nervous about what's coming next -- waiting to be seen, and getting a possible diagnosis. You get to the part about providing insurance information -- are you adequately covered?

For far too long, moments like this have haunted hardworking American families, adding unnecessary grief to already-stressful situations.

Thanks to the Affordable Care Act, more Americans than ever now have the peace of mind that comes with knowing they're covered -- and getting sick or hurt won't break the bank.

Health care shouldn't be a partisan political fight.

But this White House and the Republicans in Congress aren't giving a second thought to the families their legislation will hurt. Their main concern is the political points they'll score by undoing the progress Democrats made under President Obama.

And the only way we can stop this nightmare from repeating itself over and over again is by winning elections.

If we don't, then we won't be able to protect affordable care, create a tax code that is fair for every American, make sure our ballot box is accessible, pass comprehensive immigration reform, or do anything else that hardworking American families are counting on us to achieve. So it's critical that we all come together for the sake of our Democratic values -- or we'll risk losing everything.

That starts right now with you, Derek. We need every Democrat who has a little bit to give to pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tonight's end-of-quarter deadline.

Can you help out?

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

subject: FWD: A simple answer to a lot of questions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61ce/24c69fd9/8f9a9ae0/189d5b58/746368360/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact&source=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact")
---

Peter,

It's the last day to reach our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal -- and we're getting _so close_!

Tonight is a make-or-break deadline for candidates to prove that they've got enough support to be real contenders, and that they are building campaigns that can win.

That's why former Michigan Gov. Jennifer Granholm -- an EMILY's List candidate and a lifelong champion for women and families -- wants to help us reach this goal. She knows how crucial it is that we are able to support the women we've already endorsed (a whopping 72 so far!) and recruit and endorse even more to run and win this year and beyond.

**Join Gov. Granholm and the rest of this community to help make this our best quarter yet. Donate $3 before midnight to help women WIN:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61ce/24c69fd9/8f9a9ae0/189d5b59/746368360/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact&source=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact")**

Thanks, and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

_\----------- Original Message -----------
From: Jennifer Granholm
Date: Thurs, Sep 28, 2017 at 1:46 p.m._

Peter,

"Elect women."

It's a simple phrase. But it's the answer to so many challenges we face.

How do you protect Planned Parenthood and the millions of patients who rely on them? **Elect women.**

How do you get laws that help families thrive, not just survive? **Elect women.**

How do you stop the disastrous agenda of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and their Tea Party crew? **Elect. Women.**

Electing women is what EMILY's List does best -- they helped me do it when I ran for governor of Michigan, becoming the first woman to serve in that office. And, over the last 32 years, they've helped elect a total of more than 900 women leaders.

But the work is never done, and it's more important than ever.

**[So let's help raise the $250,000 needed by the end of September to keep electing women-- pro-choice Democratic women, to be precise.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61ce/24c69fd9/8f9a9ae0/189d5b5a/746368360/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+So+lets+help+raise+the+250000+needed+by+&utm_campaign=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact&source=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact")**

Women make up nearly two-thirds of minimum wage earners. In households with kids, 40 percent of women are the primary or sole breadwinner.

And yet, women make up less than 20 percent of Congress and a mere quarter of state legislators.

We know outcomes are different when women are at the table. There's more cooperation, and more AND BETTER legislation gets passed.

This is why I will always answer when EMILY's List calls: Because I believe we need more women to run, and we must help more women win. And EMILY's List is better at it than anyone else.

**Donate $3 before September is over and help reach that big End-of-Quarter goal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61ce/24c69fd9/8f9a9ae0/189d5b5b/746368360/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact&source=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact")**

Thank you for all you do for women who run,

Jennifer Granholm

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c61ce/24c69fd9/8f9a9ae0/189d5b54/746368360/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact&source=WQEFE966N_digital_email_20170930_EOQGranholmKick_inact")

| Dear Peter,
Our opponent, Justin Fairfax, pledged to bring Bernie Sanders' "revolution" to Virginia.
In fact, he has worked hard to make himself the Bernie Sanders of Virginia, by supporting extreme, far-left policies which even his running mates won't touch.
Sanders' grassroots "Our Revolution" group [endorsed Fairfax in the primary](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wj3b7VYKyYKoIaFvga7qBZTxzOrDyyL-7k729yJuYSK8WQd_zq_InntsTF7onPS-X-6jAHMLodaqlWZlZAEO_2xaWkabhUfHXpvGzVpsogxPc-kKrxGs4WsFxyQJiEvda-voTMukE12_2IJ1knQKihrJa0-liWANwzvX9kwhL3vfZDJ8Ywv9W8EK8htTVMDTfj6EI_fvWgkTiqfLgCyRmH7QheXcQygueVvT9Nwpzyxk_LfFSNiV-s6tUAkHnDCf-95ilqJSYym4EWeU7f6yFksXcyq137ko8cRMYXvLRSrAcRwIf1H3P3fpyIlA463Z&c=Rc8K435lv7bNudltcvnGySfknMKJg76DPLwZSg7knWZlv4qTl7FR1Q==&ch=kKOmnraUNk0TFbs5wFx_8MLyTth7yZoGdu_33VIQFCFVApLIhmALqQ==) for supporting [just about every far-left policy in the book](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wj3b7VYKyYKoIaFvga7qBZTxzOrDyyL-7k729yJuYSK8WQd_zq_InntsTF7onPS-W-1LqBZSCesezyX5w-W8Y-Ikrj9ZJHOq1NBFD_EByXASvfphEL4GSfTOKny2UbkKUfWpfs4Fp-29CPHd4yvwAYvlIVPruru89yIGvF1HNgKJpeh5tg6Be5x9i_p1EBpxLVXAYNCDhbsaMHJl6o8aMJnlIbyvZymgPcZ2SyL0VHg=&c=Rc8K435lv7bNudltcvnGySfknMKJg76DPLwZSg7knWZlv4qTl7FR1Q==&ch=kKOmnraUNk0TFbs5wFx_8MLyTth7yZoGdu_33VIQFCFVApLIhmALqQ==), from a single-payer government takeover of health care, to in-state tuition slots for those here illegally, to opposing job-creating pipelines which strengthen our infrastructure and energy security.
Fairfax even said historic statues were "psychologically harmful" and said should be removed at taxpayer expense for "celebrating slavery" - rather than following the advice of former Democratic Gov. **Tonight is our end-of-quarter deadline. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can now to help Democrats compete and win.

I'm going to get right to it, Derek -- tonight is the most important deadline we've faced this year so far.

This White House and GOP-led Congress have proven themselves dangerous, unstable, and unwilling to listen to those they're supposed to represent. In response, you -- and millions of grassroots supporters like you -- have gathered and organized to ensure that your voices are heard. We can shut down the Trump agenda if we channel that energy into winning back control of Congress next year.

But we can't do that unless our best grassroots supporters step up.

It's up to you, Derek. Chip in $3 or more before the clock strikes midnight.

name: Alex Vogel
subject: Still a bit short. Let's fix it
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Vogel for Virginia
body:
Hey Team Vogel -
I just got off the phone with Jill about our finance numbers because our deadline is tonight.
Our first TV ad is on the air and our volunteers are handing out flyers and signs faster than we can print them.
Going over our goals, we're still hoping to find 21 new grassroots donors tonight, of any amount - even $10.
Can you help us meet that goal by [becoming a donor before midnight](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q8D5-cJF78KbEOV-dzc5sVCMarVl5g1oFFaPmFcZIXFYFMI5AXABVciyvjIc517ibOrSwWpmYvR9IXJLMICNKztZSsMq4FVvxr9PQPfdxvKjiXP8fJU8VJ3zG3s1O6RyQFDu_36qQ8Gp0vMxqqpFOsO-cQy_A7Gxfej2jdAk3nwIRQeBHEaEG1urlCZhx_CudxmsvXNZTlk=&c=_t3V10-l7U6nxz7cBXkzoZ6wQLvDLC1c-CNGlxgCiI8hFcg0b_LGqQ==&ch=1xvLfOoHlvVrmb632A15G1rGmv0ri9SP3i1DDmW0IdcxS2r9NhToQg==)?
[https://donate.vogelforvirginia.com/contribute](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q8D5-cJF78KbEOV-dzc5sVCMarVl5g1oFFaPmFcZIXFYFMI5AXABVciyvjIc517ibOrSwWpmYvR9IXJLMICNKztZSsMq4FVvxr9PQPfdxvKjiXP8fJU8VJ3zG3s1O6RyQFDu_36qQ8Gp0vMxqqpFOsO-cQy_A7Gxfej2jdAk3nwIRQeBHEaEG1urlCZhx_CudxmsvXNZTlk=&c=_t3V10-l7U6nxz7cBXkzoZ6wQLvDLC1c-CNGlxgCiI8hFcg0b_LGqQ==&ch=1xvLfOoHlvVrmb632A15G1rGmv0ri9SP3i1DDmW0IdcxS2r9NhToQg==)
Jill is still out on the campaign trail (at 8:30 PM on Saturday!) and I hope I can let her know we met our goal by the time she gets back home.
She has a long drive from Southwest Virginia, but it's worth it. Jill is committed to campaigning everywhere because she will be a Lt. Governor for all Virginians.
$250, $10, or $50 would go a long way to keeping our TV budget strong.
But even $25, $10, or $5 helps us meet our grassroots donor goal.
If you saw our voter guide, this was probably a fairly easy decision for you.
Let's make the choice that easy and clear for our friends and neighbors by [raising enough money tonight](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q8D5-cJF78KbEOV-dzc5sVCMarVl5g1oFFaPmFcZIXFYFMI5AXABVciyvjIc517ibOrSwWpmYvR9IXJLMICNKztZSsMq4FVvxr9PQPfdxvKjiXP8fJU8VJ3zG3s1O6RyQFDu_36qQ8Gp0vMxqqpFOsO-cQy_A7Gxfej2jdAk3nwIRQeBHEaEG1urlCZhx_CudxmsvXNZTlk=&c=_t3V10-l7U6nxz7cBXkzoZ6wQLvDLC1c-CNGlxgCiI8hFcg0b_LGqQ==&ch=1xvLfOoHlvVrmb632A15G1rGmv0ri9SP3i1DDmW0IdcxS2r9NhToQg==) to get the word out.
[https://donate.vogelforvirginia.com/contribute](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q8D5-cJF78KbEOV-dzc5sVCMarVl5g1oFFaPmFcZIXFYFMI5AXABVciyvjIc517ibOrSwWpmYvR9IXJLMICNKztZSsMq4FVvxr9PQPfdxvKjiXP8fJU8VJ3zG3s1O6RyQFDu_36qQ8Gp0vMxqqpFOsO-cQy_A7Gxfej2jdAk3nwIRQeBHEaEG1urlCZhx_CudxmsvXNZTlk=&c=_t3V10-l7U6nxz7cBXkzoZ6wQLvDLC1c-CNGlxgCiI8hFcg0b_LGqQ==&ch=1xvLfOoHlvVrmb632A15G1rGmv0ri9SP3i1DDmW0IdcxS2r9NhToQg==)
We still need 21 brand new donors tonight, of any amount. I am confident we can meet our goal because we have the best team of supporters standing in Jill's corner.
From our whole family, we are incredibly grateful for the support of everyone across Virginia who knows that the smart policy reforms from Jill and her ticket are the key to making Virginia the best state in the nation to live, work, and raise a family.

Sincerely,
Alex Vogel

subject: say no to a "yes man"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|

| | Peter,
I've put Indiana first this year, just as I have every year. I fought against Republicans' attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and strip away health care from hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers, hitting seniors the hardest. So it's no surprise that as Republicans and their dark money allies lay out their top targets for this cycle, I'm front and center.

We won't have that kind of special interest money behind us. But we will have our grassroots campaign, and most importantly, we'll have you. **You know I wouldn 't be asking if it wasn't important -- will you pitch in today to help us meet our end-of-quarter goal and continue fighting for Hoosiers?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Joe

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Trump's neglect is killing people in Puerto Rico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Donald Trump just attacked the Mayor of San Juan, Puerto Rico
#
Friends,
Donald Trump just attacked the Mayor of San Juan, Puerto Rico for daring to call on more help for millions who are in dire need.
Today, three and a half million Americans are suffering without food, water, medicine, shelter, or electricity. Many people are dying. Yet ever since Hurricane Maria made landfall, Trump has made excuses and criticized those who seek to do more to alleviate the worst humanitarian crisis unfolding on American shores since Hurricane Katrina.
**[Contribute $3 to relief efforts. Support Carmen Yulin Cruz, Mayor of San Juan and the people of Puerto Rico from Trump's divisive attacks.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af1c/bed43eb/92f5ba/75ffe764/1486539266/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/puerto-rico?refcode=em170930-full")**
Dividing people up and blaming others are some of the worst qualities that the President of the United States can exhibit. The American people know that this is wrong, but unless we do something Trump will continue unabated while millions of people go without the aid they so desperately need.
Helping those in dire need is not about right and left--it is about right and wrong.
**[Contribute $3 to these organizations leading the relief effort for our fellow citizens.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af1c/bed43eb/92f5ba/75ffe764/1486539266/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/puerto-rico?refcode=em170930-full")**
We need everyone's support to show that excuses and attacks while people suffer and die will not go unchallenged. Thank you for making your voice heard at this critical time.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
